Alright so i wasnt kinda sure if i should release this one, i had it private for a couple days tho its only beacuse i worked really hard for it to be as good and enjoyable as it possibly could be, have fun.

The next bot is gonna be today, its gonna be another requested bot so i hope i'll make it really good.

Also, thanks everyone for all the follows and reviews, im just a few followers away from hitting 500 so as always if u'll enjoy the bot or just simply want to support me, leave a review or a follow, thank you so much.
